preferred_translation: liberation of mind through kindness towards others
definition: A liberation of mind cultivated through the brahmavihāra of kindness towards others.
notes: The project keeps karuṇā audible as kindness towards others in this compound, following the live karuṇā headword. The phrase should be written out rather than abbreviated with an ellipsis in translation notes or control surfaces. Pity-language remains discouraged because it can imply distance, superiority, or condescension.

context_rules.rendering: liberation of mind through kindness towards others

context_rules.context: When discussing the four brahmavihāra liberations as a list
